column2: Places photos unusable (portraits/interiors/construction only) across 6 queries; only 3 verifiable POIs (Cathedral of St. Martin, Marche BENA KASONGO, UNIKAB) with no faithful visual reference; no verifiable walkable outdoors POI; text-only would fabricate appearance of obscure landmarks

Data error: Bonanjo is a district of Douala, not Yaoundé; shard coords (3.8469,11.4863) fall in Yaoundé (Biyem-Assi area) where the only Places match is a snack bar named Bonanjo VIP Snack; anchor hint Bonanjo Market resolves to Marché Mokolo (different Yaoundé district); cannot name 4 real walkable POIs for a non-existent Yaoundé neighborhood

partial (2/4 uploaded: anchor + outdoors): Google Places has no photo coverage for Bole/Bortala shopping or culture POIs (all queries return zero candidates or wrong-city matches); text-only generations for Bole Commercial Pedestrian Street, Western Culture Square and Bortala Museum all invented non-existent landmark architecture and failed QA

Google Places has no coverage for Hailun (Heilongjiang): 7 queries (people's park, railway station, city government, squares, parks in zh+en) return zero candidates; the sole city-level listing photo is a misattributed Nepali mountain village; cannot name 4 real walkable POIs with visual confidence and text-only would fabricate obscure landmarks
Data error: manifest says Bristol UK but lat/lng (42.3568515,-71.0620206) and anchor hint Park Street Church match Boston MA USA; cannot name 4 real walkable POIs for Bristol UK at these coordinates
